sentences.hanzi: 你的手机是什么牌子的？
sentences.pinyin: nǐ de shǒujī shì shénme páizi de?
sentences.english: What brand is your phone?

sentences.pinyin: mìmǎ wàng le zěnme bàn?
sentences.english: What do I do if I forgot my password?

sentences.pinyin: zhèlǐ de WiFi mìmǎ shì duōshǎo?
sentences.english: What's the WiFi password here?

sentences.hanzi: 我在网上买了一台电脑。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ zài wǎngshàng mǎi le yī tái diànnǎo.
sentences.english: I bought a computer online.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ yòng shénme ruǎnjiàn liáotiān?
sentences.english: What app do you use for chatting?

sentences.pinyin: qǐng bǎ zhàopiàn fā dào qún lǐ.
sentences.english: Please send the photos to the group chat.

sentences.pinyin: wǎngsù tài màn le.
sentences.english: The internet speed is too slow.

sentences.pinyin: wǒ měitiān dōu kàn Wēixìn.
sentences.english: I check WeChat every day.

sentences.pinyin: zhège yìngyòng chéngxù hěn hǎoyòng.
sentences.english: This app is really useful.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ kěyǐ sǎo zhège èrwéimǎ.
sentences.english: You can scan this QR code.

sentences.pinyin: wǒ xūyào gēngxīn xìtǒng.
sentences.english: I need to update the system.

sentences.pinyin: shǒujī méiyǒu xìnhào.
sentences.english: The phone has no signal.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ huì yòng diànnǎo dǎzì ma?
sentences.english: Can you type on a computer?

sentences.pinyin: wǒ zài wǎngshàng dìng le wàimài.
sentences.english: I ordered delivery online.

sentences.pinyin: zhè tái dǎyìnjī zěnme yòng?
sentences.english: How do you use this printer?

sentences.pinyin: qǐng bāng wǒ xiàzài zhège wénjiàn.
sentences.english: Please help me download this file.

sentences.hanzi: 人工智能越来越普及了。
sentences.pinyin: réngōng zhìnéng yuèláiyuè pǔjí le.
sentences.english: Artificial intelligence is becoming more widespread.

sentences.pinyin: wǒ yòng shǒujī fùkuǎn.
sentences.english: I pay with my phone.

sentences.pinyin: shùjù bèifèn hěn zhòngyào.
sentences.english: Data backup is very important.

sentences.pinyin: zhège wǎngzhàn dǎ bù kāi.
sentences.english: This website won't load.

sentences.hanzi: 他在一家互联网公司工作。
sentences.pinyin: tā zài yī jiā hùliánwǎng gōngsī gōngzuò.
sentences.english: He works at an internet company.

sentences.hanzi: 网上购物越来越方便了。
sentences.pinyin: wǎngshàng gòuwù yuèláiyuè fāngbiàn le.
sentences.english: Online shopping is becoming more and more convenient.

sentences.pinyin: diànnǎo zhòngdú le xūyào shādú.
sentences.english: The computer has a virus and needs to be cleaned.

sentences.hanzi: 你平时用什么搜索引擎？
sentences.pinyin: nǐ píngshí yòng shénme sōusuǒ yǐnqíng?
sentences.english: What search engine do you usually use?

sentences.hanzi: 共享单车改变了出行方式。
sentences.pinyin: gòngxiǎng dānchē gǎibiàn le chūxíng fāngshì.
sentences.english: Bike-sharing has changed the way people travel.

sentences.pinyin: qǐng bǎ wénjiàn cún dào yúnpán lǐ.
sentences.english: Please save the file to the cloud drive.

sentences.pinyin: wǒ de diànnǎo xūyào chōngdiàn.
sentences.english: My computer needs to be charged.

sentences.pinyin: zhège shìpín zài wǎngshàng hěn huǒ.
sentences.english: This video is very popular online.

sentences.pinyin: nǐ guānzhù le jǐ ge gōngzhònghào?
sentences.english: How many official accounts do you follow?

sentences.pinyin: zàixiàn jiàoyù fāzhǎn de hěn kuài.
sentences.english: Online education is developing rapidly.

sentences.pinyin: wǒ yǒu diànnǎo.
sentences.english: I have a computer.

sentences.pinyin: tā zài kàn shǒujī.
sentences.english: He is looking at his phone.

sentences.hanzi: 人工智能技术的广泛应用对传统行业产生了深远的影响。
sentences.pinyin: réngōng zhìnéng jìshù de guǎngfàn yìngyòng duì chuántǒng hángyè chǎnshēng le shēnyuǎn de yǐngxiǎng.
sentences.english: The widespread application of artificial intelligence technology has had a profound impact on traditional industries.

sentences.hanzi: 云计算平台的安全性能评估需要遵循严格的行业标准。
sentences.pinyin: yún jìsuàn píngtái de ānquán xìngnéng pínggū xūyào zūnxún yángé de hángyè biāozhǔn.
sentences.english: Security performance evaluation of cloud computing platforms must follow strict industry standards.

sentences.hanzi: 量子计算的突破性进展有望从根本上改变密码学与信息安全的既有范式。
sentences.pinyin: liàngzǐ jìsuàn de tūpòxìng jìnzhǎn yǒuwàng cóng gēnběn shàng gǎibiàn mìmǎxué yǔ xìnxī ānquán de jìyǒu fànshì.
sentences.english: Breakthrough progress in quantum computing is expected to fundamentally change the existing paradigms of cryptography and information security.

sentences.hanzi: 边缘计算架构的优化使得物联网终端设备能够实现毫秒级的实时数据处理。
sentences.pinyin: biānyuán jìsuàn jiàgòu de yōuhuà shǐde wùliánwǎng zhōngduān shèbèi nénggòu shíxiàn háomiǎo jí de shíshí shùjù chǔlǐ.
sentences.english: Optimization of edge computing architecture enables IoT terminal devices to achieve millisecond-level real-time data processing.

sentences.hanzi: 生成式人工智能在内容创作领域的迅猛发展引发了知识产权归属的深层次争论。
sentences.pinyin: shēngchéngshì réngōng zhìnéng zài nèiróng chuàngzuò lǐngyù de xùnměng fāzhǎn yǐnfā le zhīshì chǎnquán guīshǔ de shēn céngcì zhēnglùn.
sentences.english: The rapid development of generative AI in content creation has sparked deep-level debates about intellectual property attribution.

sentences.hanzi: 自动驾驶技术的伦理框架构建需要在技术可行性与社会可接受性之间寻求平衡。
sentences.pinyin: zìdòng jiàshǐ jìshù de lúnlǐ kuàngjià gòujiàn xūyào zài jìshù kě xíngxìng yǔ shèhuì kě jiēshòuxìng zhījiān xúnqiú pínghéng.
sentences.english: Building an ethical framework for autonomous driving technology requires balancing technological feasibility with social acceptability.

sentences.hanzi: 在数字主权日益受到重视的国际格局中，各国围绕数据治理规则的博弈正深刻重塑全球科技产业的竞争版图。
sentences.pinyin: zài shùzì zhǔquán rìyì shòudào zhòngshì de guójì géjú zhōng, gèguó wéirào shùjù zhìlǐ guīzé de bóyì zhèng shēnkè chóngsù quánqiú kējì chǎnyè de jìngzhēng bǎntú.
sentences.english: In an international landscape where digital sovereignty is increasingly valued, the competition among nations over data governance rules is profoundly reshaping the competitive landscape of the global technology industry.

sentences.hanzi: 脑机接口技术的伦理审查机制尚处于早期探索阶段，亟需跨学科协作以构建兼具前瞻性与可操作性的监管框架。
sentences.pinyin: nǎojī jiēkǒu jìshù de lúnlǐ shěnchá jīzhì shàng chǔyú zǎoqī tànsuǒ jiēduàn, jíxū kuà xuékē xiézuò yǐ gòujiàn jiān jù qiánzhānxìng yǔ kě cāozuòxìng de jiānguǎn kuàngjià.
sentences.english: The ethical review mechanism for brain-computer interface technology is still in its early exploratory stages, urgently requiring interdisciplinary collaboration to build a regulatory framework that is both forward-looking and operationally feasible.
